sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Astec Industries names Chad Hartley infrastructure group president By Investing.com
feed.summary: Astec Industries, Inc. announced the appointment of Chad Hartley as Group President of Infrastructure Solutions and a member of its Executive Leadership Team, effective May 11, 2026. Hartley brings extensive manufacturing experience from Regal Rexnord and Emerson Electric. This announcement follows strong financial performance by Astec Industries, including significant stock gains and exceeding analyst expectations in its Q4 2025 earnings report.

feed.title: Apple Hospitality REIT Inc To Go Ex-Dividend On April 30th, 2026 With 0.08 USD Dividend Per Share
feed.summary: Apple Hospitality REIT Inc. is scheduled to go ex-dividend on April 30th, 2026. The company will issue a dividend of $0.08 USD per share. This indicates a regular dividend payment to shareholders.

feed.title: Associated Bank launches franchise banking unit, hires team By Investing.com
feed.summary: Associated Banc-Corp has launched a new Franchise Banking unit to offer specialized financial solutions to franchise owners and operators nationwide. The bank has hired Shaun Coard as senior vice president and business segment leader for the new unit, along with four other professionals, who will operate from Minneapolis. This expansion adds to Associated Bank's portfolio of industry-specific specialty businesses, following strong financial performance and recent mergers.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley Maintains Edison International(EIX.US) With Sell Rating, Raises Target Price to $70
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has reiterated its Sell rating on Edison International (EIX.US) but has increased its price target for the stock to $70. This adjustment suggests an updated valuation perspective despite maintaining a cautious stance on the company.

feed.title: New lawsuit claims P&G's Charmin Mega sizing is based on a phantom product consumers can't actually buy
feed.summary: A class action lawsuit has been filed against Procter & Gamble, alleging that the company deceives shoppers about the size of its Charmin Mega toilet paper. The lawsuit claims P&G uses a "phantom" Charmin Regular roll as a baseline for comparison, a product that is not widely available to consumers and is priced to inflate the perceived value of its Mega line. Furthermore, the complaint alleges shrinkflation, where the sheet count of the Regular roll has been quietly reduced, thereby shrinking the equivalent Mega products without shoppers noticing.

feed.title: This Mohawk Industries Analyst Is No Longer Bullish; Here Are Top 2 Downgrades For Tuesday
feed.summary: Baird analyst Timothy Wojs downgraded Mohawk Industries Inc. (NYSE: MHK) from Outperform to Neutral and reduced its price target from $156 to $118. Additionally, Wedbush analyst Yun Zhong downgraded Passage Bio, Inc. (NASDAQ: PASG) from Outperform to Neutral, lowering its price target from $32 to $8. These actions reflect a shift in outlook for both companies by prominent Wall Street analysts.

feed.title: A shot every 12 weeks controlled myasthenia gravis in Phase 3
feed.summary: Regeneron announced positive Phase 3 NIMBLE trial results for cemdisiran in generalized myasthenia gravis (gMG), demonstrating rapid, deep, and sustained disease control with subcutaneous dosing every 12 weeks. The trial met its primary and key secondary endpoints, showing significant improvements in MG-ADL and QMG scores compared to placebo. Regeneron has submitted a U.S. regulatory application and plans EU filings in 2026, positioning cemdisiran as a potential first-in-class siRNA therapeutic for gMG.

feed.title: Moderna wins EU nod for combined COVID, flu shot (MRNA:NASDAQ)
feed.summary: Moderna has received marketing authorization from the European Commission for its mCOMBRIAX (mRNA-1083) vaccine. This single-dose messenger RNA-based vaccine is designed to target both COVID-19 and influenza, representing a significant step in combined respiratory virus prevention. The shot is cleared for the prevention of both influenza disease and COVID-19.

feed.title: Alphabet Stock Rises Modestly as Investors Await Q1 Earnings on AI Momentum
feed.summary: Alphabet Inc. Class C shares saw a modest gain of 0.26% as investors anticipate its Q1 2026 earnings report, with a strong focus on Google Cloud growth, AI advancements, and the impact of significant capital spending. Analysts expect strong revenue growth, primarily from advertising and cloud computing, despite concerns over rising capital expenditures weighing on near-term margins. The upcoming earnings call will provide crucial insights into AI return on investment, cloud customer acquisitions, and overall financial guidance amidst the ongoing AI race and antitrust challenges.

feed.title: Skyworks will discuss Q2 results and outlook after close May 5
feed.summary: Skyworks (Nasdaq: SWKS) has announced that it will release its second quarter fiscal 2026 earnings on May 5, 2026, after market close, followed by a conference call at 4:30 p.m. EDT. The earnings release will be available via GlobeNewswire and on the company's investor website, with a replay and transcript of prepared remarks accessible from 9:00 p.m. EDT on the same day. Historically, similar earnings date announcements from Skyworks have resulted in minimal stock price movement, with investors typically focusing more on the actual earnings results and outlook.

feed.title: Skyworks Sets Date for Second Quarter Fiscal 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call
feed.summary: Skyworks Solutions, Inc. (Nasdaq: SWKS) announced it will host a conference call on May 5, 2026, at 4:30 p.m. EDT, to discuss its second quarter fiscal 2026 results and business outlook. The company will issue an earnings press release via GlobeNewswire after market close on May 5, prior to the call. Investors can access the live webcast and a playback of the call, along with a transcript of prepared remarks, on Skyworks’ investor relations website.

feed.title: CVS Pharmacy makes cold & cough relief easier with delivery straight to your door
feed.summary: CVS Pharmacy has introduced same-day delivery for over-the-counter cold and cough medications containing pseudoephedrine (PSE) or ephedrine (EPH) in 32 states. This service allows customers to purchase these products online and have them delivered, eliminating the need to visit a store when experiencing symptoms. To comply with federal and state regulations, an identity verification process via ID.me is required for these purchases, ensuring compliance with legal restrictions on these ingredients.

feed.title: Raymond James Investment Management Names Kristi Higgins Head of ETF Strategy
feed.summary: Raymond James Investment Management has appointed Kristi Higgins as Head of ETF Strategy to expand its active exchange-traded fund business, driven by increasing investor demand for lower-cost, tax-efficient investment vehicles. Higgins will focus on scaling the firm's active ETF platform and developing new products with its boutique investment teams. This move reflects a broader industry trend where asset managers are accelerating active ETF launches and integrating internal investment capabilities into packaged ETF offerings.

feed.title: Kroger Spotlights E-commerce Growth with Online Deal Days Push
feed.summary: Kroger is launching its "Online Deal Days" promotion from April 22 to May 5, aiming to boost e-commerce engagement for Pickup and Delivery services. The initiative responds to continued consumer demand for speed, value, and convenience in online grocery shopping. Offers include discounts on first orders and free delivery on orders over $50, reflecting Kroger's strategy to further integrate digital solutions.

feed.title: Halliburton upbeat on post-Iran war business outlook, predicts US drilling resurgence
feed.summary: Halliburton reported its first-quarter 2026 earnings, which were in line with analyst expectations, showing similar revenues and earnings compared to the prior year. The company is optimistic about its business outlook following the Iran war, forecasting higher oil and gas prices, as well as an increase in US drilling and completions. Halliburton anticipates an improved financial performance in the coming period.

feed.title: Berenberg Initiates Palo Alto Networks at Buy: Is AI the Next Inflection for Cybersecurity's Quality Compounder?
feed.summary: Berenberg initiated coverage of Palo Alto Networks (PANW) with a Buy rating and a $215 price target, hailing the company as a "quality compounder" in cybersecurity. The investment firm highlighted Palo Alto's diversified security platforms, consistent financial execution with non-GAAP operating margins over 30%, and strategic acquisition of AI security firm Koi for $400 million. Berenberg views AI as a significant long-term growth catalyst for Palo Alto Networks, which is well-positioned to capitalize on increasing enterprise spending on integrated security solutions.

feed.title: Vrbo announces 2026 top vacation rentals of the year
feed.summary: Vrbo has announced its fifth annual list of Vacation Rentals of the Year for 2026, recognizing over 50 standout properties globally. These rentals, all earning a "Loved by Guests" badge, demonstrate exceptional quality and reliability based on guest reviews, with many boasting perfect 10/10 ratings. The list aims to inspire travelers and highlights properties with unique amenities and high standards in popular destinations.

feed.title: 424B2
feed.summary: This preliminary pricing supplement describes Autocallable Contingent Coupon Equity Linked Securities issued by Citigroup Global Markets Holdings Inc., guaranteed by Citigroup Inc., and linked to the Nasdaq-100, Russell 2000, and S&P 500 indices. These securities offer potential for periodic contingent coupon payments but expose investors to risks including significant loss of principal, lack of liquidity, and credit risk of the issuers, with performance solely dependent on the worst performing underlying index. The document details key terms such as payment at maturity, automatic early redemption conditions, and various risk factors.

feed.title: BreachLock Named Representative Vendor in the 2026 Gartner Market Guide for Adversarial Exposure Validation
feed.summary: BreachLock, a leader in offensive security, has been recognized as a representative vendor in the 2026 Gartner Market Guide for Adversarial Exposure Validation. This marks their first inclusion in the AEV category since launching an AI-powered platform in 2025. BreachLock is noted for uniquely offering adversarial exposure validation, Penetration Testing as a Service (PTaaS), and Continuous Threat Exposure Management (CTEM) within a single unified platform.

feed.title: Goldman Names Fintech Banker Gido Co-Chair of Financials Group
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs has appointed Jeff Gido as co-chair of its financial institutions group within investment banking. Gido, a veteran fintech banker who joined the firm in 2001, will focus on driving commercial opportunities and advising key clients, especially in the fintech sector. This move elevates his role within the company's investment banking division.

feed.title: CrowdStrike Holdings Inc Stock (CRWD) Moved Up by 5.11% on Apr 21: What Investors Need To Know
feed.summary: CrowdStrike Holdings Inc (CRWD) stock rose by 5.11% due to an analyst upgrade from Keybanc to Overweight with a $525 price target and the company's expanded Managed Security Service Provider (MSSP) strategy in Japan and Asia-Pacific. The move is also attributed to increasing demand for AI-driven cybersecurity, highlighted by their "Mythos technology" and involvement in "Project Glasswing." Despite positive news, the article notes risks including high valuation, a pending lawsuit from Delta Air Lines, and consistent insider selling.

feed.title: ServiceNow Inc Stock (NOW) Moved Up by 4.05% on Apr 21: Key Drivers Unveiled
feed.summary: ServiceNow Inc. (NOW) stock increased by 4.05% on April 21, driven by anticipation of Q1 2026 earnings, recent strategic acquisitions like Armis, and the unveiling of new AI-native solutions. Analysts maintain largely positive ratings, citing the company's expanding cybersecurity offerings and pervasive AI integration as key growth factors. Although some price targets have been adjusted, the overall sentiment points to ServiceNow's strong position in the growing enterprise AI market.

feed.title: Palo Alto Networks Inc Stock (PANW) Moved Up by 3.84% on Apr 21: Facts Behind the Movement
feed.summary: Palo Alto Networks (PANW) stock increased by 3.84% on April 21st, driven by positive analyst ratings, strategic product launches, and expanding partnerships within a growing cybersecurity market. Berenberg initiated coverage with a "Buy" rating, while Cantor Fitzgerald and Piper Sandler reiterated "Overweight" ratings. The company recently launched a secure browser for businesses and expanded its SASE offering, capitalizing on increased demand for unified, AI-driven security solutions.

feed.title: Cinco de Mayo meets Taco Tuesday, and Old El Paso built a merch box
feed.summary: Old El Paso is celebrating a rare "Taco Totality" on May 5th, where Cinco de Mayo and Taco Tuesday coincide. To mark this occasion, which won't happen again until 2037, the company is releasing a limited-edition Taco Totality Gear Box. The box includes new Old El Paso TABASCO® Sauce flavored taco shells, a themed T-shirt, a neck pillow, and "Multi-Spectrum Taco Shield Glasses."

feed.title: Early human data on Aprea cancer drug lands ASCO 2026 poster slot
feed.summary: Aprea Therapeutics announced that its abstract detailing early results from the first-in-human Phase 1 ACESOT-1051 study of the WEE1 inhibitor APR-1051 for advanced solid tumors has been accepted for presentation at the ASCO 2026 Annual Meeting. The presentation will be a poster session on May 30, 2026, featuring initial safety and activity findings. This marks a significant clinical milestone, with investors closely watching for efficacy, safety, and biomarker data.

feed.title: Raymond James Hires Dimensional Exec to Build Out ETF Strategy
feed.summary: Raymond James Investment Management has appointed Kristi Higgins, formerly of Dimensional Fund Advisors, as its head of ETF strategy. Higgins will focus on expanding the firm's presence in the active ETF market and transitioning affiliated managers' strategies into more tax-efficient and flexible ETF products. This move aligns with Raymond James' long-term product strategy to deepen its footprint in the growing ETF space.

feed.title: Cambridge drugmaker wins EU approval for combination shot amid FDA battles
feed.summary: Moderna Inc. has received important approval in Europe for its combination shot, despite ongoing challenges with the U.S. Food and Drug Administration. The Cambridge-based drugmaker's success in Europe marks a significant milestone as it navigates regulatory hurdles in the U.S.

feed.title: Humana (NYSE: HUM) director Robert Field reports zero common shares on Form 3
feed.summary: Humana Inc. director Robert Stuart Field has filed an initial Form 3, disclosing his beneficial ownership of Humana Common stock. The filing, dated April 16, 2026, indicates that Field holds 0 shares of Humana Common directly after the reported event, with no buy or sell transactions recorded. This Form 3 serves as an initial statement of ownership for new insiders, providing transparency on their starting stake in the company.

feed.title: Environmental Health & Engineering Names New CEO
feed.summary: Environmental Health & Engineering (EH&E) has announced that current president and chief operating officer, Kevin Coghlan, MS, CIH, will take over as CEO, succeeding co-founder John "Jack" McCarthy, ScD, CIH. Dr. McCarthy will continue to serve as chairman of the board. Coghlan, who joined EH&E in 1994, has worked alongside McCarthy since 2021 and will continue the firm's legacy of multidisciplinary approaches to environmental health and building systems engineering.

feed.title: Jewish anti-Zionist group files ‘genocide’ claim against FedEx over Israel deliveries
feed.summary: A French anti-Zionist group, the Jewish Union for Peace (UJFP), has filed a "genocide" complaint against FedEx's French subsidiary, alleging the company transported components for Israeli F-35 fighter jets used in Gaza. FedEx denies transporting weapons or ammunition, while Israel maintains its actions in Gaza are aimed at minimizing civilian casualties and denies genocide. The complaint is based on a report claiming FedEx transited 117 cargoes through Paris to Israel, prompting a probe into one such delivery in Belgium.

feed.title: Rockwell Automation helps ice cream maker boost inventory accuracy
feed.summary: Rockwell Automation's Plex Smart Manufacturing Platform has significantly improved inventory accuracy and operational efficiency for Chocolate Shoppe Ice Cream Company. The platform led to a 27% improvement in inventory accuracy, an 18% reduction in raw material inventory, and streamlined inventory management processes. Rockwell Automation (NYSE:ROK) has shown strong performance with a 48% gross profit margin, reflecting the demand for its manufacturing solutions.

feed.title: Full Transcript: Genuine Parts Q1 2026 Earnings Call
feed.summary: Genuine Parts Co (NYSE: GPC) reported strong Q1 2026 sales of $6.3 billion, a 7% increase year-over-year, with growth across all business segments. The company is on schedule to separate its global automotive and industrial businesses into two publicly traded entities by Q1 2027. Despite geopolitical tensions, GPC reaffirmed its full-year outlook, balancing strong Q1 performance with potential future disruptions and cost pressures.

feed.title: Wabtec earnings under scrutiny: M&A integration on trial By Investing.com
feed.summary: Wabtec is set to report its first-quarter earnings, with analysts focusing on the integration of its recent $3.5 billion acquisition spree, particularly the impact on profitable growth and segment performance. The company's ability to realize synergies from deals like Dellner Couplers and Frauscher Sensor Technology, coupled with ongoing capital investment from Class I railroads, will be key to sustaining its growth momentum. Investors will scrutinize the Freight and Transit segments' performance and backlog trends to assess if Wabtec's M&A strategy and premium valuation are justified amidst an anticipated multi-year equipment upgrade cycle.

feed.title: Valmont Industries Posts Upbeat Q1 Results, Joins UnitedHealth Group, Quest Diagnostics And Other Big Sto
feed.summary: Valmont Industries (NYSE: VMI) reported strong first-quarter results, exceeding analyst expectations for both earnings per share and sales, leading to an 11% surge in its stock. The company also raised its FY2026 GAAP EPS guidance. Several other major stocks, including UnitedHealth Group, Quest Diagnostics, D.R. Horton, and others, also saw significant gains following positive news like earnings beats or strategic announcements.

feed.title: Associated Bank accelerates commercial growth with new Franchise Banking vertical
feed.summary: Associated Banc-Corp has launched a new, nationally focused Franchise Banking vertical to accelerate commercial growth and expand its specialty financial solutions. Shaun Coard has been appointed as senior vice president and business segment leader for this new initiative, bringing over 30 years of financial services experience to the role. This strategic move aims to strengthen Associated's position as an industry-focused financial partner and deepen relationships with franchise owners nationwide.

feed.title: Deutsche Bank Initiates Booking Holdings(BKNG.US) With Buy Rating, Announces Target Price $210
feed.summary: Deutsche Bank has initiated coverage on Booking Holdings (BKNG.US) with a "Buy" rating. The firm has set a target price of $210 for the stock, indicating a positive outlook.

feed.title: D.R. Horton Reports Q2 2026 Results: Full Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: D.R. Horton reported strong Q2 2026 results with a consolidated pre-tax income of $867 million and revenues of $7.6 billion, exceeding guidance. The company saw an 11% year-over-year increase in net sales orders and reduced unsold completed homes by 35%, emphasizing a focus on affordability and capital efficiency. D.R. Horton anticipates home sales gross margin to be around 19.7% or higher in Q3, with full-year consolidated revenues projected between $33.5 billion and $34.5 billion.

feed.title: Starbucks aims for 2,000 jobs at new corporate office
feed.summary: Starbucks announced its plans for a new corporate office in Nashville, projecting the creation of 2,000 jobs. This expansion represents one of the largest job announcements in Davidson County's history, with state and Metro officials celebrating the company's commitment to the Music City.

feed.title: Moderna lines up melanoma and myeloma data for ASCO in Chicago
feed.summary: Moderna announced that three abstracts on its investigational mRNA therapeutics have been accepted for presentation at the 2026 ASCO Annual Meeting. The presentations include a 5-year update on intismeran plus pembrolizumab in resected melanoma, and two poster presentations covering intismeran autogene as adjuvant therapy in melanoma and mRNA-2808 in multiple myeloma. Moderna will also host a live investor webcast on June 1 to discuss these presentations.

feed.title: Starbucks Workers Are Resisting Moving to Its New $100 Million Nashville Hub
feed.summary: Starbucks is investing $100 million in a new corporate office in Nashville, planning to house 2,000 jobs there over the next five years, including some technology roles from Seattle. However, the company is encountering resistance from employees regarding the relocation from its Seattle headquarters.

feed.title: Banks and credit unions win Alkami awards for digital banking
feed.summary: Alkami announced the winners of its 2026 customer awards programs, the FIsionaries and "For the MANTL" Awards, at Alkami Co:lab 2026. These awards recognize financial institutions and leaders for their innovation in digital relationship banking across various categories like Transformational Culture, Data Strategy, User Experience, Digital Transformation, and Omnichannel Excellence. The announcement highlights Alkami's strategy of ecosystem expansion and customer adoption within the digital banking sector.

feed.title: Financial Institutions and Leaders Recognized at Alkami Co:lab 2026 for Driving Innovation & Relationship Banking
feed.summary: Alkami Technology, Inc. announced the winners of its 2026 FIsionaries™ Awards and the inaugural "For the MANTL" Awards at Alkami Co:lab 2026. These awards recognize financial institutions and leaders for their innovation in digital banking, strategic transformation, data execution, user experience, and for achieving outstanding success with the MANTL Origination & Onboarding Platform. The programs highlight efforts to redefine relationship banking and foster community growth through transformative technology and customer engagement.

feed.title: Incyte's lymphoma drug gets ASCO oral slot as Phase 3 data back filings
feed.summary: Incyte announced that full results from its Phase 3 frontMIND study evaluating tafasitamab (Monjuvi®/Minjuvi®) in first-line diffuse large B-cell lymphoma (DLBCL) will be presented as an oral presentation at the 2026 American Society of Clinical Oncology (ASCO) Annual Meeting. These positive results highlight Incyte's commitment to developing new treatments for DLBCL and support global regulatory submissions for the drug. The presentation will detail the study of tafasitamab plus lenalidomide and R-CHOP for newly diagnosed DLBCL patients.

feed.title: Huntington Bank Awards 70 Charlotte-area Educators with Year-long Professional Development Experience
feed.summary: Huntington Bank has awarded 70 educators from Anson, Mecklenburg, and Union counties in the Charlotte area with a year-long professional development experience through its "Ignite the Classroom" initiative. This program, now in its third year, aims to enhance teaching skills and student learning within the bank's footprint. Educators will receive training and support throughout the school year, including a visit to the internationally recognized Ron Clark Academy in Atlanta.

feed.title: Allied Gaming probes unusual stock trading, short-selling activity
feed.summary: Allied Gaming & Entertainment Inc. (NASDAQ:AGAE) has formed a special committee to investigate unusual volatility and short-selling activity in its stock, following analysis from an AI firm indicating high short-sale trading percentages. The company plans to take appropriate measures, including reporting suspicious activity to regulatory bodies, and is engaging professional service providers for support. Allied Gaming maintains a solid asset base and liquidity, and also recently resolved a legal dispute and announced board changes, alongside plans to launch a cryptocurrency in 2026.

feed.title: Moderna wins EU approval for combined flu, COVID shot for older adults
feed.summary: Moderna has received marketing authorization from the European Commission for its combination vaccine designed to prevent both influenza and COVID-19. This approval is specifically for adults aged 50 years and older. The development marks a significant step in offering a single shot solution for these two respiratory viruses in the older population.

feed.title: UnitedHealth Earnings: Rate Actions Improve Medical Cost Ratio and Boost 2026 Outlook
feed.summary: UnitedHealth Group reported better-than-expected first-quarter results with 2% revenue growth and flat adjusted EPS, leading to a 9% stock rally. The company also raised its 2026 adjusted EPS outlook to at least $18.25, up from $17.75, due to an improving medical cost ratio from repricing at-risk plans. Despite increased operational and regulatory risks, Morningstar maintains a moderately undervalued rating with a $427 fair value estimate for UnitedHealth.

feed.title: Procter & Gamble (NYSE:PG) Price Target Lowered to $175.00 at Jefferies Financial Group
feed.summary: Jefferies Financial Group has lowered its price target for Procter & Gamble (NYSE:PG) to $175.00 from $179.00, while maintaining a "buy" rating on the stock, suggesting a potential upside of 21.72%. Other analysts have also adjusted their price targets and ratings, with the company currently holding an average "Moderate Buy" rating and an average target price of $162.79 among analysts. The article also details recent insider stock sales and institutional investment activity.

feed.title: American Electric Power (NASDAQ:AEP) Price Target Raised to $143.00 at Raymond James Financial
feed.summary: Raymond James Financial has increased its price target for American Electric Power (NASDAQ:AEP) from $138.00 to $143.00, maintaining an "outperform" rating, suggesting a potential upside of 8.05%. This follows several other analyst adjustments, with AEP currently holding a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating and an average target price of $138.32. The company recently reported strong quarterly earnings, beating consensus estimates, and has also seen insider stock sales by two EVPs.

feed.title: American Electric Power (NASDAQ:AEP) Given New $136.00 Price Target at Morgan Stanley
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has lowered its price target for American Electric Power (AEP) to $136.00 from $137.00, maintaining an "overweight" rating. Despite this, several other analysts have recently upgraded AEP and raised their price targets, contributing to a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating and an average price target of $138.32. The article also provides details on the company's recent financial performance, insider transactions, and institutional holdings.
